refund_exclusions.normalized_meaning_for_followup: Refund exclusion: reasons not caused by FermatMind/Fermat test service.

refund_handling_time.normalized_meaning_for_followup: Refund handling time: three business days.

data_deletion_handling_time.normalized_meaning_for_followup: Data deletion handling time: two years, as provided by the policy owner.

retained_data_exceptions_after_deletion.normalized_meaning_for_followup: No retained-data exceptions after completed deletion.

privacy_analytics_wording_confirmation.normalized_meaning_for_followup: GA4, Baidu analytics, and first-party analytics privacy wording is confirmed as correct by the policy owner.

blocker_resolution_mapping.remaining_gate: Apply the answers to the draft content package/CMS draft fields in a separate authorized PR.
Apply the answers to the draft content package/CMS draft fields in a separate authorized PR.
Apply the confirmation to the relevant draft metadata/content in a separate authorized PR.
Decide whether draft links should use the existing public canonical /support route or a new CMS-backed contact-support route.
Verify visible FAQ to JSON-LD equality only after policy fields are applied and public visibility is authorized.

recommended_pr_train.purpose: Decide public canonical handling for contact support references before content revision.
Add or verify first-class CMS fields needed for support contact, policy version, reviewer, FAQ items, and schema gate authority.
Apply policy owner answers to the local revised v01 Help content package or generated import package without CMS writes.
Sync the policy-updated package to the existing 12 Help CMS drafts while preserving draft/non-public/non-indexable/unpublished state.
Run second read-only operator review request after policy answers and contact-support handling are applied.
Enable or harden Help FAQ schema only from visible CMS/backend FAQ authority.
Run publish preflight over CMS draft state, support routes, schema, canonical paths, sitemap/llms, and private URL guards.
Publish the 12 Help ContentPage drafts only after exact publish authorization.
Verify public 200s, canonical paths, schema, sitemap/llms exposure, and private URL guardrails after publish.
